webpackUniversalModuleDefinition(root, factory) {\n\tif(typeof exports === 'object' && typeof module === 'object')\n\t\tmodule.exports = factory(require(\"csharp\"), require(\"puerts\"));\n\telse if(typeof define === 'function' && define.amd)\n\t\tdefine([\"csharp\", \"puerts\"], factory);\n\telse {\n\t\tvar a = typeof exports === 'object' ? factory(require(\"csharp\"), require(\"puerts\")) : factory(root[\"csharp\"], root[\"puerts\"]);\n\t\tfor(var i in a) (typeof exports === 'object' ? exports : root)[i] = a[i];\n\t}\n})(global, function(__WEBPACK_EXTERNAL_MODULE__0__, __WEBPACK_EXTERNAL_MODULE__2__) {\nreturn "," \t// The module cache\n \tvar installedModules = {};\n\n \t// The require function\n \tfunction __webpack_require__(moduleId) {\n\n \t\t// Check if module is in cache\n \t\tif(installedModules[moduleId]) {\n \t\t\treturn installedModules[moduleId].exports;\n \t\t}\n \t\t// Create a new module (and put it into the cache)\n \t\tvar module = installedModules[moduleId] = {\n \t\t\ti: moduleId,\n \t\t\tl: false,\n \t\t\texports: {}\n \t\t};\n\n \t\t// Execute the module function\n \t\tmodules[moduleId].call(module.exports, module, module.exports, __webpack_require__);\n\n \t\t// Flag the module as loaded\n \t\tmodule.l = true;\n\n \t\t// Return the exports of the module\n \t\treturn module.exports;\n \t}\n\n\n \t// expose the modules object (__webpack_modules__)\n \t__webpack_require__.m = modules;\n\n \t// expose the module cache\n \t__webpack_require__.c = installedModules;\n\n \t// define getter function for harmony exports\n \t__webpack_require__.d = function(exports, name, getter) {\n \t\tif(!__webpack_require__.o(exports, name)) {\n \t\t\tObject.defineProperty(exports, name, { enumerable: true, get: getter });\n \t\t}\n \t};\n\n \t// define __esModule on exports\n \t__webpack_require__.r = function(exports) {\n \t\tif(typeof Symbol !== 'undefined' && Symbol.toStringTag) {\n \t\t\tObject.defineProperty(exports, Symbol.toStringTag, { value: 'Module' });\n \t\t}\n \t\tObject.defineProperty(exports, '__esModule', { value: true });\n \t};\n\n \t// create a fake namespace object\n \t// mode & 1: value is a module id, require it\n \t// mode & 2: merge all properties of value into the ns\n \t// mode & 4: return value when already ns object\n \t// mode & 8|1: behave like require\n \t__webpack_require__.t = function(value, mode) {\n \t\tif(mode & 1) value = __webpack_require__(value);\n \t\tif(mode & 8) return value;\n \t\tif((mode & 4) && typeof value === 'object' && value && value.__esModule) return value;\n \t\tvar ns = Object.create(null);\n \t\t__webpack_require__.r(ns);\n \t\tObject.defineProperty(ns, 'default', { enumerable: true, value: value });\n \t\tif(mode & 2 && typeof value != 'string') for(var key in value) __webpack_require__.d(ns, key, function(key) { return value[key]; }.bind(null, key));\n \t\treturn ns;\n \t};\n\n \t// getDefaultExport function for compatibility with non-harmony modules\n \t__webpack_require__.n = function(module) {\n \t\tvar getter = module && module.__esModule ?\n \t\t\tfunction getDefault() { return module['default']; } :\n \t\t\tfunction getModuleExports() { return module; };\n \t\t__webpack_require__.d(getter, 'a', getter);\n \t\treturn getter;\n \t};\n\n \t// Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call\n \t__webpack_require__.o = function(object, property) { return Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(object, property); };\n\n \t// __webpack_public_path__\n \t__webpack_require__.p = \"\";\n\n\n \t// Load entry module and return exports\n \treturn __webpack_require__(__webpack_require__.s = 3);\n","module.exports = __WEBPACK_EXTERNAL_MODULE__0__;","'use strict';\n\n/**\n * Check if we're required to add a port number.\n *\n * @see https://url.spec.whatwg.org/#default-port\n * @param {Number|String} port Port number we need to check\n * @param {String} protocol Protocol we need to check against.\n * @returns {Boolean} Is it a default port for the given protocol\n * @api private\n */\nmodule.exports = function required(port, protocol) {\n  protocol = protocol.split(':')[0];\n  port = +port;\n\n  if (!port) return false;\n\n  switch (protocol) {\n    case 'http':\n    case 'ws':\n    return port !== 80;\n\n    case 'https':\n    case 'wss':\n    return port !== 443;\n\n    case 'ftp':\n    return port !== 21;\n\n    case 'gopher':\n    return port !== 70;\n\n    case 'file':\n    return false;\n  }\n\n  return port !== 0;\n};\n","module.exports = __WEBPACK_EXTERNAL_MODULE__2__;","import { UnityEngine, UnityEditor } from 'csharp';\r\nimport { $typeof } from 'puerts';\r\nenum LogType {\r\n\tError = 0,\r\n\tAssert = 1,\r\n\tWarning = 2,\r\n\tLog = 3,\r\n\tException = 4\r\n}\r\n\r\nconst scriptResources = new Map<string, UnityEngine.Object>();\r\nconst emptyResources = new UnityEngine.Object();\r\nconst isUnityEditor = UnityEngine.Application.isEditor;\r\n\r\nfunction print(type: LogType, showStack : boolean, ...args: unknown[]) {\r\n\tlet message = '';\r\n\tfor (let i = 0; i < args.length; i++) {\r\n\t\tconst element = args[i];\r\n\t\tif (typeof element === 'object' && console.LOG_OBJECT_TO_JSON) {\r\n\t\t\tmessage += JSON.stringify(element);\r\n\t\t} else {\r\n\t\t\tmessage += element;\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t\tif (i < args.length - 1) {\r\n\t\t\tmessage += ' ';\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t}\r\n\tlet unityLogTarget: UnityEngine.Object = null;\r\n\tif (showStack || UnityEngine.Application.isEditor) {\r\n\t\tvar stacks = new Error().stack.split('\\n');\r\n\t\tfor (let i = 3; i < stacks.length; i++) {\r\n\t\t\tlet line = stacks[i];\r\n\t\t\tmessage += '\\n';\r\n\t\t\tif (isUnityEditor) {\r\n\t\t\t\tconst matches = line.match(/at\\s.*?\\s\\((.*?)\\:(\\d+)/);\r\n\t\t\t\tif (matches && matches.length >= 3) {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tlet file = matches[1].replace(/\\\\/g, '/');\r\n\t\t\t\t\tfile = file.replace(/.*\\/Assets\\//, 'Assets/');\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst lineNumber = matches[2];\r\n\t\t\t\t\tline = line.replace(/\\s\\(/, ` (<a href=\"${file}\" line=\"${lineNumber}\">`);\r\n\t\t\t\t\tline = line.replace(/\\)$/, ' </a>)');\r\n\t\t\t\t\tif (!unityLogTarget) {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif (!scriptResources.has(file)) {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tscriptResources.set(file, UnityEditor.AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath(file, $typeof(UnityEngine.Object)));\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tunityLogTarget = scriptResources.get(file);\r\n\t\t\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\tmessage += line;\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t}\r\n\tmessage = message.replace(/{/gm, '{{');\r\n\tmessage = message.replace(/}/gm, '}}');\r\n\tUnityEngine.Debug.LogFormat(type, UnityEngine.LogOption.NoStacktrace, unityLogTarget || emptyResources, message);\r\n}\r\n\r\nconst ConsoleObject = {\r\n\tlog: (...args: unknown[]) => print(LogType.Log, false, ...args),\r\n\tinfo: (...args: unknown[]) => print(LogType.Log, true, ...args),\r\n\ttrace: (...args: unknown[]) => print(LogType.Log, true, ...args),\r\n\twarn: (...args: unknown[]) => print(LogType.Warning, true, ...args),\r\n\terror: (...args: unknown[]) => print(LogType.Error, true, ...args),\r\n\tLOG_OBJECT_TO_JSON: false,\r\n};\r\n\r\nif (typeof(console) === 'undefined') {\r\n\tObject.defineProperty(globalThis, 'console', {\r\n\t\tvalue: ConsoleObject,\r\n\t\tenumerable: true,\r\n\t\tconfigurable: true,\r\n\t\twritable: false\r\n\t});\r\n} else {\r\n\tlet globalConsole = (globalThis as unknown)['console'];\r\n\tfor (const key in ConsoleObject) {\r\n\t\tObject.defineProperty(globalConsole, key, { value: ConsoleObject[key], enumerable: true, configurable: true, writable: typeof(ConsoleObject[key]) !== 'function' });\r\n\t}\r\n}","interface FrameAction {\r\n\tid: number;\r\n\tcallback: (now: number)=>void;\r\n}\r\n\r\nlet actions: FrameAction[] = [];\r\nlet global_action_id = 0;\r\n\r\nfunction cancelAnimationFrame(handle: number): void {\r\n\tactions = actions.filter( a => a.id !== handle );\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction requestAnimationFrame(callback: (now: number)=>void): number {\r\n\tlet action = {\r\n\t\tcallback,\r\n\t\tid: ++global_action_id,\r\n\t}\r\n\tactions.push(action);\r\n\treturn action.id;\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction tick(now: number) {\r\n\tfor (const action of actions) {\r\n\t\taction.callback(now);\r\n\t}\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport default {\r\n\ttick,\r\n\texports: {\r\n\t\trequestAnimationFrame,\r\n\t\tcancelAnimationFrame\r\n\t}\r\n};","/** Evaluation phase of the event flow */\r\nexport enum Phase {\r\n\t/** No event is being processed at this time. */\r\n\tNONE,\r\n\t/** The event is being propagated through the target's ancestor objects. */\r\n\tCAPTURING_PHASE,\r\n\t/** The event has arrived at the event's target. Event listeners registered for this phase are called at this time. If Event.bubbles is false, processing the event is finished after this phase is complete. */\r\n\tAT_TARGET,\r\n\t/** The event is propagating back up through the target's ancestors in reverse order, starting with the parent, and eventually reaching the containing Window. This is known as bubbling, and occurs only if Event.bubbles is true. Event listeners registered for this phase are triggered during this process. */\r\n\tBUBBLING_PHASE,\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport interface EventInit {\r\n\tbubbles?: boolean;\r\n\tcancelable?: boolean;\r\n\tcomposed?: boolean;\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * The Event interface represents an event which takes place in the DOM.\r\n *\r\n * An event can be triggered by the user action e.g. clicking the mouse button or tapping keyboard, or generated by APIs to represent the progress of an asynchronous task. It can also be triggered programmatically, such as by calling the HTMLElement.click() method of an element, or by defining the event, then sending it to a specified target using EventTarget.dispatchEvent().\r\n *\r\n * There are many types of events, some of which use other interfaces based on the main Event interface. Event itself contains the properties and methods which are common to all events.\r\n *\r\n * Many DOM elements can be set up to accept (or \"listen\" for) these events, and execute code in response to process (or \"handle\") them. Event-handlers are usually connected (or \"attached\") to various HTML elements (such as <button>, <div>, <span>, etc.) using EventTarget.addEventListener(), and this generally replaces using the old HTML event handler attributes. Further, when properly added, such handlers can also be disconnected if needed using removeEventListener().\r\n */\r\nexport class Event {\r\n\r\n\tconstructor(type: string, eventInitDict?: EventInit) {\r\n\t\tthis._type = type;\r\n\t\tif (eventInitDict) {\r\n\t\t\tthis._bubbles = eventInitDict.bubbles;\r\n\t\t\tthis._cancelable = eventInitDict.cancelable;\r\n\t\t\tthis._composed = eventInitDict.composed;\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\t/**\r\n\t * Returns true or false depending on how event was initialized. True if event goes through its target's ancestors in reverse tree order, and false otherwise.\r\n\t */\r\n\tget bubbles(): boolean { return this._bubbles; }\r\n\tprotected _bubbles: boolean;\r\n\tcancelBubble: boolean;\r\n\r\n\t/**\r\n\t * Returns true or false depending on how event was initialized. Its return value does not always carry meaning, but true can indicate that part of the operation during which event was dispatched, can be canceled by invoking the preventDefault() method.\r\n\t */\r\n\tget cancelable(): boolean { return this._cancelable; }\r\n\tprotected _cancelable: boolean;\r\n\r\n\t/**\r\n\t * Returns true or false depending on how event was initialized. True if event invokes listeners past a ShadowRoot node that is the root of its target, and false otherwise.\r\n\t */\r\n\tget composed(): boolean { return this._composed; }\r\n\tprotected _composed: boolean;\r\n\r\n\t/**\r\n\t * Returns the object whose event listener's callback is currently being invoked.\r\n\t */\r\n\tget currentTarget(): EventTarget { return this._currentTarget; }\r\n\tprotected _currentTarget: EventTarget;\r\n\r\n\t/**\r\n\t * Returns true if preventDefault() was invoked successfully to indicate cancelation, and false otherwise.\r\n\t */\r\n\tget defaultPrevented(): boolean { return this._defaultPrevented; }\r\n\tprotected _defaultPrevented: boolean;\r\n\r\n\t/**\r\n\t * Returns the event's phase, which is one of NONE, CAPTURING_PHASE, AT_TARGET, and BUBBLING_PHASE.\r\n\t */\r\n\tget eventPhase(): Phase { return this._eventPhase; }\r\n\tprotected _eventPhase: Phase;\r\n\r\n\t/**\r\n\t * Returns true if event was dispatched by the user agent, and false otherwise.\r\n\t */\r\n\tget isTrusted(): boolean { return this._isTrusted; }\r\n\tprotected _isTrusted: boolean;\r\n\r\n\treturnValue: boolean;\r\n\r\n\t/**\r\n\t * Returns the object to which event is dispatched (its target).\r\n\t */\r\n\tget target(): EventTarget { return this._target; }\r\n\tprotected _target: EventTarget;\r\n\r\n\t/**\r\n\t * Returns the event's timestamp as the number of milliseconds measured relative to the time origin.\r\n\t */\r\n\tget timeStamp(): number { return this._timeStamp; }\r\n\tprotected _timeStamp: number;\r\n\r\n\t/**\r\n\t * Returns the type of event, e.g. \"click\", \"hashchange\", or \"submit\".\r\n\t */\r\n\tget type(): string { return this._type; }\r\n\tprotected _type: string;\r\n\r\n\t/**\r\n\t * Returns the invocation target objects of event's path (objects on which listeners will be invoked), except for any nodes in shadow trees of which the shadow root's mode is \"closed\" that are not reachable from event's currentTarget.\r\n\t */\r\n\tcomposedPath(): EventTarget[] {\r\n\t\treturn [];\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tinitEvent(type: string, bubbles?: boolean, cancelable?: boolean): void {\r\n\t\tthis._type = type;\r\n\t\tthis._bubbles = bubbles;\r\n\t\tthis._cancelable = cancelable;\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\t/**\r\n\t * If invoked when the cancelable attribute value is true, and while executing a listener for the event with passive set to false, signals to the operation that caused event to be dispatched that it needs to be canceled.\r\n\t */\r\n\tpreventDefault(): void {\r\n\t\tif (this.cancelable) {\r\n\t\t\tthis._defaultPrevented = true;\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\t/**\r\n\t * Invoking this method prevents event from reaching any registered event listeners after the current one finishes running and, when dispatched in a tree, also prevents event from reaching any other objects.\r\n\t */\r\n\tstopImmediatePropagation(): void {\r\n\t\tthis._defaultPrevented = true;\r\n\t\tthis.cancelBubble = false;\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\t/**\r\n\t * When dispatched in a tree, invoking this method prevents event from reaching any objects other than the current object.\r\n\t */\r\n\tstopPropagation(): void {\r\n\t\tif (this._bubbles) {\r\n\t\t\tthis.cancelBubble = true;\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t}\r\n}\r\n\r\ninterface ProgressEventInit extends EventInit {\r\n\tlengthComputable?: boolean;\r\n\tloaded?: number;\r\n\ttotal?: number;\r\n}\r\n\r\n/** Events measuring progress of an underlying process, like an HTTP request (for an XMLHttpRequest, or the loading of the underlying resource of an <img>, <audio>, <video>, <style> or <link>). */\r\nexport class ProgressEvent<T extends EventTarget = EventTarget> extends Event {\r\n\tget lengthComputable(): boolean { return this._lengthComputable; }\r\n\tprotected _lengthComputable: boolean;\r\n\r\n\tget loaded(): number { return this._loaded; }\r\n\tprotected _loaded: number;\r\n\r\n\tget total(): number { return this._total; }\r\n\tprotected _total: number;\r\n\r\n\tconstructor(type: string, eventInitDict?: ProgressEventInit) {\r\n\t\tsuper(type, eventInitDict);\r\n\t\tif (eventInitDict) {\r\n\t\t\tthis._lengthComputable = eventInitDict.lengthComputable;\r\n\t\t\tthis._loaded = eventInitDict.loaded;\r\n\t\t\tthis._total = eventInitDict.total;\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t}\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport interface EventListener {\r\n\t(evt: Event): void;\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport interface EventListenerObject {\r\n\thandleEvent(evt: Event): void;\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport interface EventListenerOptions {\r\n\tcapture?: boolean;\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport interface AddEventListenerOptions extends EventListenerOptions {\r\n\tonce?: boolean;\r\n\tpassive?: boolean;\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport type EventListenerOrEventListenerObject = EventListener | EventListenerObject;\r\n\r\ninterface EventListenerRecord extends AddEventListenerOptions {\r\n\tlistener: EventListenerOrEventListenerObject;\r\n}\r\n\r\n\r\nexport class EventTarget {\r\n\r\n\tprotected _listeners: {[key: string]: EventListenerRecord[]} = {};\r\n\r\n\t/**\r\n\t * Appends an event listener for events whose type attribute value is type. The callback argument sets the callback that will be invoked when the event is dispatched.\r\n\t *\r\n\t * The options argument sets listener-specific options. For compatibility this can be a boolean, in which case the method behaves exactly as if the value was specified as options's capture.\r\n\t *\r\n\t * When set to true, options's capture prevents callback from being invoked when the event's eventPhase attribute value is BUBBLING_PHASE. When false (or not present), callback will not be invoked when event's eventPhase attribute value is CAPTURING_PHASE. Either way, callback will be invoked if event's eventPhase attribute value is AT_TARGET.\r\n\t *\r\n\t * When set to true, options's passive indicates that the callback will not cancel the event by invoking preventDefault(). This is used to enable performance optimizations described in § 2.8 Observing event listeners.\r\n\t *\r\n\t * When set to true, options's once indicates that the callback will only be invoked once after which the event listener will be removed.\r\n\t *\r\n\t * The event listener is appended to target's event listener list and is not appended if it has the same type, callback, and capture.\r\n\t */\r\n\tpublic addEventListener(type: string, listener: EventListenerOrEventListenerObject, options?: boolean | AddEventListenerOptions): void {\r\n\t\tif (!listener) return;\r\n\t\tif (!(type in this._listeners)) {\r\n\t\t\tthis._listeners[type] = [];\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t\tlet recorder: EventListenerRecord = { listener };\r\n\t\tif (typeof options === \"boolean\") {\r\n\t\t\trecorder.capture = options;\r\n\t\t} else if (typeof options === 'object') {\r\n\t\t\trecorder = { ...options, listener };\r\n\t\t}\r\n\r\n\t\tthis._listeners[type].push(recorder);\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\t/**\r\n\t * Dispatches a synthetic event event to target and returns true if either event's cancelable attribute value is false or its preventDefault() method was not invoked, and false otherwise.\r\n\t */\r\n\tpublic dispatchEvent(event: Event): boolean {\r\n\r\n\t\tif (!event || typeof event.type != 'string') return true;\r\n\t\tconst origin_recorders = this._listeners[event.type];\r\n\t\tif (!origin_recorders) return true;\r\n\r\n\t\tconst recorders = origin_recorders.slice();\r\n\t\tif (!recorders.length) return !event.defaultPrevented;\r\n\t\tevent['_target'] = this;\r\n\t\tlet once_listeners: EventListenerRecord[] = [];\r\n\t\tfor (const recorder of recorders) {\r\n\t\t\tlet listener: EventListener = null;\r\n\t\t\tif ((recorder.listener as EventListenerObject).handleEvent) {\r\n\t\t\t\tlistener = (recorder.listener as EventListenerObject).handleEvent;\r\n\t\t\t} else {\r\n\t\t\t\tlistener = recorder.listener as EventListener;\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\r\n\t\t\tif (typeof listener === 'function') {\r\n\t\t\t\tlistener.call(this, event);\r\n\t\t\t\tif (recorder.once) {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tonce_listeners.push(recorder);\r\n\t\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\tif (event.defaultPrevented) break;\r\n\t\t}\r\n\r\n\t\tfor (let i = 0; i < once_listeners.length; i++) {\r\n\t\t\torigin_recorders.splice(origin_recorders.indexOf(once_listeners[i]), 1);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t\treturn !event.defaultPrevented;\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\t/**\r\n\t * Removes the event listener in target's event listener list with the same type, callback, and options.\r\n\t */\r\n\tpublic removeEventListener(type: string, listener: EventListenerOrEventListenerObject, options?: EventListenerOptions | boolean): void {\r\n\t\tif (!listener || !(type in this._listeners)) return;\r\n\t\tconst recorders = this._listeners[type];\r\n\t\tfor (let i = 0; i < recorders.length; i++) {\r\n\t\t\tconst recorder = recorders[i];\r\n\t\t\tif (recorder.listener === listener) {\r\n\t\t\t\tlet sameOptions = true;\r\n\t\t\t\tif (typeof options === \"boolean\") {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tsameOptions = recorder.capture == options;\r\n\t\t\t\t} else if (typeof options === 'object') {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tsameOptions = recorder.capture == options.capture;\r\n\t\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\t\tif (sameOptions) {\r\n\t\t\t\t\trecorders.splice(i, 1);\r\n\t\t\t\t\tbreak;\r\n\t\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t}\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport default {\r\n\texports: {\r\n\t\tPhase,\r\n\t\tEvent,\r\n\t\tProgressEvent,\r\n\t\tEventTarget\r\n\t}\r\n};\r\n","type TimerHandler = Function;\r\n\r\ninterface Timer {\r\n\thandler: TimerHandler;\r\n\ttimeout: number;\r\n\tnext_time?: number;\r\n\targs?: any[];\r\n\toneshot?: boolean;\r\n}\r\nlet global_timer_id = 0;\r\n\r\nconst pending_timers = new Map<number, Timer>();\r\nconst processing_timers = new Map<number, Timer>();\r\nconst removing_timers = new Set<number>();\r\n\r\nfunction timer_loop(){\r\n\tconst now = WebAPI.getHighResTimeStamp();\r\n\r\n\tfor (const [id, timer] of pending_timers) {\r\n\t\tprocessing_timers.set(id, timer);\r\n\t}\r\n\tpending_timers.clear();\r\n\r\n\tfor (const id of removing_timers) {\r\n\t\tprocessing_timers.delete(id);\r\n\t}\r\n\tremoving_timers.clear();\r\n\r\n\tfor (const [id, timer] of processing_timers) {\r\n\t\tif (timer.next_time <= now) {\r\n\t\t\ttry {\r\n\t\t\t\tif (timer.handler) timer.handler.apply(null, timer.args);\r\n\t\t\t} catch (error) {\r\n\t\t\t\tconsole.error(`Error in timer handler: ${error.message}\\n${error.stack}`);\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\tif (timer.oneshot) {\r\n\t\t\t\tremoving_timers.add(id);\r\n\t\t\t} else {\r\n\t\t\t\ttimer.next_time = now + timer.timeout;\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t}\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction make_timer(handler: TimerHandler, timeout?: number, ...args: any[]): Timer {\r\n\treturn {\r\n\t\thandler,\r\n\t\ttimeout,\r\n\t\tnext_time: WebAPI.getHighResTimeStamp() + (timeout || 0),\r\n\t\targs\r\n\t};\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction pend_timer(timer: Timer): number {\r\n\tpending_timers.set(++global_timer_id, timer);\r\n\treturn global_timer_id;\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction setTimeout(handler: TimerHandler, timeout?: number, ...args: any[]): number {\r\n\tconst timer = make_timer(handler, timeout, ...args);\r\n\ttimer.oneshot = true;\r\n\treturn pend_timer(timer);\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction clearTimeout(handle?: number): void {\r\n\tremoving_timers.add(handle);\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction setInterval(handler: TimerHandler, timeout?: number, ...args: any[]): number {\r\n\treturn pend_timer(make_timer(handler, timeout, ...args));\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction clearInterval(handle?: number): void {\r\n\tremoving_timers.add(handle);\r\n}\r\n\r\nlet timer_loop_id = 0;\r\n\r\nexport default {\r\n\tinitialize() {\r\n\t\ttimer_loop_id = requestAnimationFrame(timer_loop);\r\n\t},\r\n\tuninitialize() {\r\n\t\tcancelAnimationFrame(timer_loop_id);\r\n\t},\r\n\texports: {\r\n\t\tsetTimeout,\r\n\t\tclearTimeout,\r\n\t\tsetInterval,\r\n\t\tclearInterval,\r\n\t}\r\n};\r\n","import { EventTarget } from \"./event\";\r\n\r\n/** Encapsulates a single performance metric that is part of the performance timeline. A performance entry can be directly created by making a performance mark or measure (for example by calling the mark() method) at an explicit point in an application. Performance entries are also created in indirect ways such as loading a resource (such as an image). */\r\nclass PerformanceEntry {\r\n\treadonly duration: number;\r\n\treadonly entryType: string;\r\n\treadonly name: string;\r\n\treadonly startTime: number;\r\n\r\n\tconstructor(name: string, startTime: number, entryType: string, duration = 0) {\r\n\t\tthis.startTime = startTime;\r\n\t\tthis.name = name;\r\n\t\tthis.entryType = entryType;\r\n\t\tthis.duration = duration;\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\ttoJSON() {\r\n\t\treturn {\r\n\t\t\tduration: this.duration,\r\n\t\t\tentryType: this.entryType,\r\n\t\t\tname: this.name,\r\n\t\t\tstartTime: this.startTime,\r\n\t\t};\r\n\t};\r\n}\r\n\r\nclass PerformanceMark extends PerformanceEntry {}\r\nclass PerformanceMeasure extends PerformanceEntry {}\r\ntype PerformanceEntryList = PerformanceEntry[];\r\n\r\nconst MARK_TYPE = \"mark\";\r\nconst MEASURE_TYPE = \"measure\";\r\n\r\nclass Performance extends EventTarget {\r\n\treadonly timeOrigin: number;\r\n\tprivate _entries = new Map<string, PerformanceEntryList>();\r\n\r\n\tnow() {\r\n\t\treturn Date.now() - this.timeOrigin;\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tconstructor() {\r\n\t\tsuper();\r\n\t\tthis.timeOrigin = Date.now();\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tgetEntries(): PerformanceEntryList {\r\n\t\tlet ret: PerformanceEntryList = [];\r\n\t\tfor (const [type, list] of this._entries) {\r\n\t\t\tret = ret.concat(list);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t\treturn ret;\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tgetEntriesByName(name: string, type?: string): PerformanceEntryList {\r\n\t\tlet ret: PerformanceEntryList = [];\r\n\t\tfor (const [entryType, list] of this._entries) {\r\n\t\t\tif (type && type != entryType) continue;\r\n\t\t\tlist.map(e => {\r\n\t\t\t\tif (e.name == name) {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tret.push(e);\r\n\t\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t\treturn ret;\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tgetEntriesByType(type: string): PerformanceEntryList {\r\n\t\treturn this._entries.get(type);\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tmark(markName: string) {\r\n\t\tconst mark = new PerformanceMark(markName, this.now(), MARK_TYPE);\r\n\t\tlet marks: PerformanceEntryList = this._entries.get(MARK_TYPE);\r\n\t\tif (!marks) {\r\n\t\t\tmarks = [ mark ];\r\n\t\t\tthis._entries.set(MARK_TYPE, marks);\r\n\t\t} else {\r\n\t\t\tmarks.push(mark);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t\treturn mark;\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tmeasure(measureName: string, startMark: string, endMark: string) {\r\n\t\tlet starts = this.getEntriesByName(startMark, MARK_TYPE);\r\n\t\tif (starts.length == 0) throw new Error(`The mark '${startMark}' does not exist.`);\r\n\t\tlet ends = this.getEntriesByName(endMark, MARK_TYPE);\r\n\t\tif (ends.length == 0) throw new Error(`The mark '${endMark}' does not exist.`);\r\n\t\tconst start = starts[starts.length - 1];\r\n\t\tconst end = ends[ends.length - 1];\r\n\t\tconst measure = new PerformanceMeasure(measureName, start.startTime, MEASURE_TYPE, end.startTime - start.startTime);\r\n\t\tlet measures: PerformanceEntryList = this._entries.get(MEASURE_TYPE);\r\n\t\tif (!measures) {\r\n\t\t\tmeasures = [ measure ];\r\n\t\t\tthis._entries.set(MEASURE_TYPE, measures);\r\n\t\t} else {\r\n\t\t\tmeasures.push(measure);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t\treturn measure;\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tclearMarks(markName: string): void {\r\n\t\tlet marks = this._entries.get(MARK_TYPE);\r\n\t\tif (marks) {\r\n\t\t\tmarks = marks.filter( m => m.name === markName );\r\n\t\t\tthis._entries.set(MARK_TYPE, marks);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tclearMeasures(measureName: string): void {\r\n\t\tlet measures = this._entries.get(MARK_TYPE);\r\n\t\tif (measures) {\r\n\t\t\tmeasures = measures.filter( m => m.name === measureName );\r\n\t\t\tthis._entries.set(MEASURE_TYPE, measures);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\ttoJSON() {\r\n\t\treturn {\r\n\t\t\ttimeOrigin: this.timeOrigin,\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n};\r\n\r\nexport default {\r\n\texports: {\r\n\t\tPerformance,\r\n\t\tPerformanceEntry,\r\n\t\tPerformanceMark,\r\n\t\tPerformanceMeasure,\r\n\t\tperformance: new Performance()\r\n\t}\r\n};\r\n","import { System } from \"csharp\";\r\nObject.setPrototypeOf(System.Text.Encoding.UTF8, System.Text.Encoding.prototype);\r\nObject.setPrototypeOf(System.Text.Encoding.ASCII, System.Text.Encoding.prototype);\r\n\r\nfunction btoa(text: string): string {\r\n\treturn System.Convert.ToBase64String(System.Text.Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(text));\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction atob(base64: string): string {\r\n\tlet data = System.Convert.FromBase64String(base64);\r\n\tlet base64Decoded = System.Text.Encoding.ASCII.GetString(data);\r\n\treturn base64Decoded;\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport default {\r\n\texports: {\r\n\t\tatob,\r\n\t\tbtoa\r\n\t}\r\n};\r\n","interface StorageItem {\r\n\tkey: string,\r\n\tvalue: string,\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport class Storage {\r\n\r\n\tprotected _items: StorageItem[] = [];\r\n\r\n\t/**\r\n\t * Returns the number of key/value pairs currently present in the list associated with the object.\r\n\t */\r\n\tget length(): number { return this._items.length; }\r\n\r\n\t/**\r\n\t * Empties the list associated with the object of all key/value pairs, if there are any.\r\n\t */\r\n\tclear(): void {\r\n\t\tthis._items = [];\r\n\t\tthis.flush();\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\t/**\r\n\t * Returns the current value associated with the given key, or null if the given key does not exist in the list associated with the object.\r\n\t */\r\n\tgetItem(key: string): string | null {\r\n\t\tfor (const item of this._items) {\r\n\t\t\tif (item.key === key)\r\n\t\t\t\treturn item.value;\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t\treturn null;\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\t/**\r\n\t * Returns the name of the nth key in the list, or null if n is greater than or equal to the number of key/value pairs in the object.\r\n\t */\r\n\tkey(index: number): string | null {\r\n\t\tfor (let i = 0; i < this._items.length; i++) {\r\n\t\t\tif (i === index)\r\n\t\t\t\treturn this._items[i].key;\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t\treturn null;\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\t/**\r\n\t * Removes the key/value pair with the given key from the list associated with the object, if a key/value pair with the given key exists.\r\n\t */\r\n\tremoveItem(key: string): void {\r\n\t\tlet idx = -1;\r\n\t\tfor (let i = 0; i < this._items.length; i++) {\r\n\t\t\tif (this._items[i].key === key) {\r\n\t\t\t\tidx = i;\r\n\t\t\t\tbreak;\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t\tif (idx != -1) {\r\n\t\t\tthis._items.splice(idx, 1);\r\n\t\t\tthis.flush();\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\t/**\r\n\t * Sets the value of the pair identified by key to value, creating a new key/value pair if none existed for key previously.\r\n\t *\r\n\t * Throws a \"QuotaExceededError\" DOMException exception if the new value couldn't be set. (Setting could fail if, e.g., the user has disabled storage for the site, or if the quota has been exceeded.)\r\n\t */\r\n\tsetItem(key: string, value: string): void {\r\n\t\tlet idx = -1;\r\n\t\tfor (let i = 0; i < this._items.length; i++) {\r\n\t\t\tif (this._items[i].key === key) {\r\n\t\t\t\tidx = i;\r\n\t\t\t\tbreak;\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t\tif (idx != -1) {\r\n\t\t\tif (this._items[idx].value != value) {\r\n\t\t\t\tthis._items[idx].value = value;\r\n\t\t\t\tthis.flush();\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t} else {\r\n\t\t\tthis._items.push({key, value});\r\n\t\t\tthis.flush();\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t}\r\n\tprotected flush() {}\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport default {\r\n\texports: {\r\n\t\tStorage,\r\n\t\tsessionStorage: new Storage(),\r\n\t}\r\n};\r\n","// @ts-nocheck\r\nimport { System, UnityEngine } from \"csharp\";\r\nimport { Storage } from './storage'\r\n\r\nclass LocalStorage extends Storage {\r\n\tprotected $file: string;\r\n\tprotected $directory: string;\r\n\r\n\tconstructor(file: string = `${UnityEngine.Application.persistentDataPath}/webapi/localStorage.json`) {\r\n\t\tsuper();\r\n\t\tthis.$file = file;\r\n\t\tthis.$directory = System.IO.Path.GetDirectoryName(this.$file);\r\n\t\tif (System.IO.File.Exists(file)) {\r\n\t\t\ttry {\r\n\t\t\t\tconst stream = new System.IO.StreamReader(file);\r\n\t\t\t\tconst text = stream.ReadToEnd();\r\n\t\t\t\tthis._items = JSON.parse(text);\r\n\t\t\t} catch (error) {\r\n\t\t\t\tthrow new Error(\"Cannot open storage file \" + file);\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tprotected flush() {\r\n\t\tif (!System.IO.File.Exists(this.$directory)) {\r\n\t\t\tSystem.IO.Directory.CreateDirectory(this.$directory);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t\tconst stream = new System.IO.StreamWriter(this.$file);\r\n\t\tif (stream) {\r\n\t\t\tlet text = JSON.stringify(this._items, undefined, '\\t');\r\n\t\t\tstream.Write(text);\r\n\t\t\tstream.Flush();\r\n\t\t\tstream.Dispose();\r\n\t\t} else {\r\n\t\t\tthrow new Error(\"Cannot open storage file \" + this.$file);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t}\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport default {\r\n\texports: {\r\n\t\tStorage,\r\n\t\tsessionStorage: new Storage(),\r\n\t\tlocalStorage: new LocalStorage(),\r\n\t}\r\n};\r\n","const has = Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty;\r\nconst undef = undefined;\r\n/**\r\n * Decode a URI encoded string.\r\n *\r\n * @param {String} input The URI encoded string.\r\n * @returns {String|Null} The decoded string.\r\n * @api private\r\n */\r\nfunction decode(input) {\r\n  try {\r\n    return decodeURIComponent(input.replace(/\\+/g, ' '));\r\n  } catch (e) {\r\n    return null;\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Attempts to encode a given input.\r\n *\r\n * @param {String} input The string that needs to be encoded.\r\n * @returns {String|Null} The encoded string.\r\n * @api private\r\n */\r\nfunction encode(input) {\r\n  try {\r\n    return encodeURIComponent(input);\r\n  } catch (e) {\r\n    return null;\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Simple query string parser.\r\n *\r\n * @param {String} query The query string that needs to be parsed.\r\n * @returns {Object}\r\n * @api public\r\n */\r\nfunction querystring(query) {\r\n  let parser = /([^=?#&]+)=?([^&]*)/g\r\n    , result = {}\r\n    , part;\r\n\r\n  while (part = parser.exec(query)) {\r\n    let key = decode(part[1])\r\n      , value = decode(part[2]);\r\n\r\n    //\r\n    // Prevent overriding of existing properties. This ensures that build-in\r\n    // methods like `toString` or __proto__ are not overriden by malicious\r\n    // querystrings.\r\n    //\r\n    // In the case if failed decoding, we want to omit the key/value pairs\r\n    // from the result.\r\n    //\r\n    if (key === null || value === null || key in result) continue;\r\n    result[key] = value;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return result;\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Transform a query string to an object.\r\n *\r\n * @param {Object} obj Object that should be transformed.\r\n * @param {String} prefix Optional prefix.\r\n * @returns {String}\r\n * @api public\r\n */\r\nfunction querystringify(obj, prefix) {\r\n  prefix = prefix || '';\r\n\r\n  let pairs = []\r\n    , value\r\n    , key;\r\n\r\n  //\r\n  // Optionally prefix with a '?' if needed\r\n  //\r\n  if ('string' !== typeof prefix) prefix = '?';\r\n\r\n  for (key in obj) {\r\n    if (has.call(obj, key)) {\r\n      value = obj[key];\r\n\r\n      //\r\n      // Edge cases where we actually want to encode the value to an empty\r\n      // string instead of the stringified value.\r\n      //\r\n      if (!value && (value === null || value === undef || isNaN(value))) {\r\n        value = '';\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      key = encode(key);\r\n      value = encode(value);\r\n\r\n      //\r\n      // If we failed to encode the strings, we should bail out as we don't\r\n      // want to add invalid strings to the query.\r\n      //\r\n      if (key === null || value === null) continue;\r\n      pairs.push(key +'='+ value);\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return pairs.length ? prefix + pairs.join('&') : '';\r\n}\r\n\r\n//\r\n// Expose the module.\r\n//\r\nexport const stringify = querystringify;\r\nexport const parse = querystring;","import required from 'requires-port';\r\nimport * as qs from './querystringify';\r\n\r\nconst slashes = /^[A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9+-.]*:\\/\\//\r\n  , protocolre = /^([a-z][a-z0-9.+-]*:)?(\\/\\/)?([\\S\\s]*)/i\r\n  , whitespace = '[\\\\x09\\\\x0A\\\\x0B\\\\x0C\\\\x0D\\\\x20\\\\xA0\\\\u1680\\\\u180E\\\\u2000\\\\u2001\\\\u2002\\\\u2003\\\\u2004\\\\u2005\\\\u2006\\\\u2007\\\\u2008\\\\u2009\\\\u200A\\\\u202F\\\\u205F\\\\u3000\\\\u2028\\\\u2029\\\\uFEFF]'\r\n  , left = new RegExp('^'+ whitespace +'+');\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Trim a given string.\r\n *\r\n * @param {String} str String to trim.\r\n * @public\r\n */\r\nfunction trimLeft(str) {\r\n  return (str ? str : '').toString().replace(left, '');\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * These are the parse rules for the URL parser, it informs the parser\r\n * about:\r\n *\r\n * 0. The char it Needs to parse, if it's a string it should be done using\r\n *    indexOf, RegExp using exec and NaN means set as current value.\r\n * 1. The property we should set when parsing this value.\r\n * 2. Indication if it's backwards or forward parsing, when set as number it's\r\n *    the value of extra chars that should be split off.\r\n * 3. Inherit from location if non existing in the parser.\r\n * 4. `toLowerCase` the resulting value.\r\n */\r\nlet rules = [\r\n  ['#', 'hash'],                        // Extract from the back.\r\n  ['?', 'query'],                       // Extract from the back.\r\n  function sanitize(address) {          // Sanitize what is left of the address\r\n    return address.replace('\\\\', '/');\r\n  },\r\n  ['/', 'pathname'],                    // Extract from the back.\r\n  ['@', 'auth', 1],                     // Extract from the front.\r\n  [NaN, 'host', undefined, 1, 1],       // Set left over value.\r\n  [/:(\\d+)$/, 'port', undefined, 1],    // RegExp the back.\r\n  [NaN, 'hostname', undefined, 1, 1]    // Set left over.\r\n];\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * These properties should not be copied or inherited from. This is only needed\r\n * for all non blob URL's as a blob URL does not include a hash, only the\r\n * origin.\r\n *\r\n * @type {Object}\r\n * @private\r\n */\r\nlet ignore = { hash: 1, query: 1 };\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * The location object differs when your code is loaded through a normal page,\r\n * Worker or through a worker using a blob. And with the blobble begins the\r\n * trouble as the location object will contain the URL of the blob, not the\r\n * location of the page where our code is loaded in. The actual origin is\r\n * encoded in the `pathname` so we can thankfully generate a good \"default\"\r\n * location from it so we can generate proper relative URL's again.\r\n *\r\n * @param {Object|String} loc Optional default location object.\r\n * @returns {Object} lolcation object.\r\n * @public\r\n */\r\nfunction lolcation(loc) {\r\n  let globalVar;\r\n\r\n  if (typeof window !== 'undefined') globalVar = window;\r\n  else if (typeof global !== 'undefined') globalVar = global;\r\n  else if (typeof self !== 'undefined') globalVar = self;\r\n  else globalVar = {};\r\n\r\n  let location = globalVar.location || {};\r\n  loc = loc || location;\r\n\r\n  let finaldestination = {}\r\n    , type = typeof loc\r\n    , key;\r\n\r\n  if ('blob:' === loc.protocol) {\r\n    finaldestination = new Url(unescape(loc.pathname), {});\r\n  } else if ('string' === type) {\r\n    finaldestination = new Url(loc, {});\r\n    for (key in ignore) delete finaldestination[key];\r\n  } else if ('object' === type) {\r\n    for (key in loc) {\r\n      if (key in ignore) continue;\r\n      finaldestination[key] = loc[key];\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    if (finaldestination.slashes === undefined) {\r\n      finaldestination.slashes = slashes.test(loc.href);\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return finaldestination;\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * @typedef ProtocolExtract\r\n * @type Object\r\n * @property {String} protocol Protocol matched in the URL, in lowercase.\r\n * @property {Boolean} slashes `true` if protocol is followed by \"//\", else `false`.\r\n * @property {String} rest Rest of the URL that is not part of the protocol.\r\n */\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Extract protocol information from a URL with/without double slash (\"//\").\r\n *\r\n * @param {String} address URL we want to extract from.\r\n * @return {ProtocolExtract} Extracted information.\r\n * @private\r\n */\r\nfunction extractProtocol(address) {\r\n  address = trimLeft(address);\r\n  let match = protocolre.exec(address);\r\n\r\n  return {\r\n    protocol: match[1] ? match[1].toLowerCase() : '',\r\n    slashes: !!match[2],\r\n    rest: match[3]\r\n  };\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Resolve a relative URL pathname against a base URL pathname.\r\n *\r\n * @param {String} relative Pathname of the relative URL.\r\n * @param {String} base Pathname of the base URL.\r\n * @return {String} Resolved pathname.\r\n * @private\r\n */\r\nfunction resolve(relative, base) {\r\n  if (relative === '') return base;\r\n\r\n  let path = (base || '/').split('/').slice(0, -1).concat(relative.split('/'))\r\n    , i = path.length\r\n    , last = path[i - 1]\r\n    , unshift = false\r\n    , up = 0;\r\n\r\n  while (i--) {\r\n    if (path[i] === '.') {\r\n      path.splice(i, 1);\r\n    } else if (path[i] === '..') {\r\n      path.splice(i, 1);\r\n      up++;\r\n    } else if (up) {\r\n      if (i === 0) unshift = true;\r\n      path.splice(i, 1);\r\n      up--;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  if (unshift) path.unshift('');\r\n  if (last === '.' || last === '..') path.push('');\r\n\r\n  return path.join('/');\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * The actual URL instance. Instead of returning an object we've opted-in to\r\n * create an actual constructor as it's much more memory efficient and\r\n * faster and it pleases my OCD.\r\n *\r\n * It is worth noting that we should not use `URL` as class name to prevent\r\n * clashes with the global URL instance that got introduced in browsers.\r\n *\r\n * @constructor\r\n * @param {String} address URL we want to parse.\r\n * @param {Object|String} [location] Location defaults for relative paths.\r\n * @param {Boolean|Function} [parser] Parser for the query string.\r\n * @private\r\n */\r\nfunction Url(address, location, parser) {\r\n  address = trimLeft(address);\r\n\r\n  if (!(this instanceof Url)) {\r\n    return new Url(address, location, parser);\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  let relative, extracted, parse, instruction, index, key\r\n    , instructions = rules.slice()\r\n    , type = typeof location\r\n    , url = this\r\n    , i = 0;\r\n\r\n  //\r\n  // The following if statements allows this module two have compatibility with\r\n  // 2 different API:\r\n  //\r\n  // 1. Node.js's `url.parse` api which accepts a URL, boolean as arguments\r\n  //    where the boolean indicates that the query string should also be parsed.\r\n  //\r\n  // 2. The `URL` interface of the browser which accepts a URL, object as\r\n  //    arguments. The supplied object will be used as default values / fall-back\r\n  //    for relative paths.\r\n  //\r\n  if ('object' !== type && 'string' !== type) {\r\n    parser = location;\r\n    location = null;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  if (parser && 'function' !== typeof parser) parser = qs.parse;\r\n\r\n  location = lolcation(location);\r\n\r\n  //\r\n  // Extract protocol information before running the instructions.\r\n  //\r\n  extracted = extractProtocol(address || '');\r\n  relative = !extracted.protocol && !extracted.slashes;\r\n  url.slashes = extracted.slashes || relative && location.slashes;\r\n  url.protocol = extracted.protocol || location.protocol || '';\r\n  address = extracted.rest;\r\n\r\n  //\r\n  // When the authority component is absent the URL starts with a path\r\n  // component.\r\n  //\r\n  if (!extracted.slashes) instructions[3] = [/(.*)/, 'pathname'];\r\n\r\n  for (; i < instructions.length; i++) {\r\n    instruction = instructions[i];\r\n\r\n    if (typeof instruction === 'function') {\r\n      address = instruction(address);\r\n      continue;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    parse = instruction[0];\r\n    key = instruction[1];\r\n\r\n    if (parse !== parse) {\r\n      url[key] = address;\r\n    } else if ('string' === typeof parse) {\r\n      if (~(index = address.indexOf(parse))) {\r\n        if ('number' === typeof instruction[2]) {\r\n          url[key] = address.slice(0, index);\r\n          address = address.slice(index + instruction[2]);\r\n        } else {\r\n          url[key] = address.slice(index);\r\n          address = address.slice(0, index);\r\n        }\r\n      }\r\n    } else if ((index = parse.exec(address))) {\r\n      url[key] = index[1];\r\n      address = address.slice(0, index.index);\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    url[key] = url[key] || (\r\n      relative && instruction[3] ? location[key] || '' : ''\r\n    );\r\n\r\n    //\r\n    // Hostname, host and protocol should be lowercased so they can be used to\r\n    // create a proper `origin`.\r\n    //\r\n    if (instruction[4]) url[key] = url[key].toLowerCase();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  //\r\n  // Also parse the supplied query string in to an object. If we're supplied\r\n  // with a custom parser as function use that instead of the default build-in\r\n  // parser.\r\n  //\r\n  if (parser) url.query = parser(url.query);\r\n\r\n  //\r\n  // If the URL is relative, resolve the pathname against the base URL.\r\n  //\r\n  if (\r\n      relative\r\n    && location.slashes\r\n    && url.pathname.charAt(0) !== '/'\r\n    && (url.pathname !== '' || location.pathname !== '')\r\n  ) {\r\n    url.pathname = resolve(url.pathname, location.pathname);\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  //\r\n  // We should not add port numbers if they are already the default port number\r\n  // for a given protocol. As the host also contains the port number we're going\r\n  // override it with the hostname which contains no port number.\r\n  //\r\n  if (!required(url.port, url.protocol)) {\r\n    url.host = url.hostname;\r\n    url.port = '';\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  //\r\n  // Parse down the `auth` for the username and password.\r\n  //\r\n  url.username = url.password = '';\r\n  if (url.auth) {\r\n    instruction = url.auth.split(':');\r\n    url.username = instruction[0] || '';\r\n    url.password = instruction[1] || '';\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  url.origin = url.protocol && url.host && url.protocol !== 'file:'\r\n    ? url.protocol +'//'+ url.host\r\n    : 'null';\r\n\r\n  //\r\n  // The href is just the compiled result.\r\n  //\r\n  url.href = url.toString();\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * This is convenience method for changing properties in the URL instance to\r\n * insure that they all propagate correctly.\r\n *\r\n * @param {String} part          Property we need to adjust.\r\n * @param {Mixed} value          The newly assigned value.\r\n * @param {Boolean|Function} fn  When setting the query, it will be the function\r\n *                               used to parse the query.\r\n *                               When setting the protocol, double slash will be\r\n *                               removed from the final url if it is true.\r\n * @returns {URL} URL instance for chaining.\r\n * @public\r\n */\r\nfunction set(part, value, fn) {\r\n  let url = this;\r\n\r\n  switch (part) {\r\n    case 'query':\r\n      if ('string' === typeof value && value.length) {\r\n        value = (fn || qs.parse)(value);\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      url[part] = value;\r\n      break;\r\n\r\n    case 'port':\r\n      url[part] = value;\r\n\r\n      if (!required(value, url.protocol)) {\r\n        url.host = url.hostname;\r\n        url[part] = '';\r\n      } else if (value) {\r\n        url.host = url.hostname +':'+ value;\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      break;\r\n\r\n    case 'hostname':\r\n      url[part] = value;\r\n\r\n      if (url.port) value += ':'+ url.port;\r\n      url.host = value;\r\n      break;\r\n\r\n    case 'host':\r\n      url[part] = value;\r\n\r\n      if (/:\\d+$/.test(value)) {\r\n        value = value.split(':');\r\n        url.port = value.pop();\r\n        url.hostname = value.join(':');\r\n      } else {\r\n        url.hostname = value;\r\n        url.port = '';\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      break;\r\n\r\n    case 'protocol':\r\n      url.protocol = value.toLowerCase();\r\n      url.slashes = !fn;\r\n      break;\r\n\r\n    case 'pathname':\r\n    case 'hash':\r\n      if (value) {\r\n        let char = part === 'pathname' ? '/' : '#';\r\n        url[part] = value.charAt(0) !== char ? char + value : value;\r\n      } else {\r\n        url[part] = value;\r\n      }\r\n      break;\r\n\r\n    default:\r\n      url[part] = value;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  for (let i = 0; i < rules.length; i++) {\r\n    let ins = rules[i];\r\n\r\n    if (ins[4]) url[ins[1]] = url[ins[1]].toLowerCase();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  url.origin = url.protocol && url.host && url.protocol !== 'file:'\r\n    ? url.protocol +'//'+ url.host\r\n    : 'null';\r\n\r\n  url.href = url.toString();\r\n\r\n  return url;\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Transform the properties back in to a valid and full URL string.\r\n *\r\n * @param {Function} stringify Optional query stringify function.\r\n * @returns {String} Compiled version of the URL.\r\n * @public\r\n */\r\nfunction toString(stringify) {\r\n  if (!stringify || 'function' !== typeof stringify) stringify = qs.stringify;\r\n\r\n  let query\r\n    , url = this\r\n    , protocol = url.protocol;\r\n\r\n  if (protocol && protocol.charAt(protocol.length - 1) !== ':') protocol += ':';\r\n\r\n  let result = protocol + (url.slashes ? '//' : '');\r\n\r\n  if (url.username) {\r\n    result += url.username;\r\n    if (url.password) result += ':'+ url.password;\r\n    result += '@';\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  result += url.host + url.pathname;\r\n\r\n  query = 'object' === typeof url.query ? stringify(url.query) : url.query;\r\n  if (query) result += '?' !== query.charAt(0) ? '?'+ query : query;\r\n\r\n  if (url.hash) result += url.hash;\r\n\r\n  return result;\r\n}\r\n\r\nUrl.prototype = { set: set, toString: toString };\r\n\r\n//\r\n// Expose the URL parser and some additional properties that might be useful for\r\n// others or testing.\r\n//\r\nUrl.extractProtocol = extractProtocol;\r\nUrl.location = lolcation;\r\nUrl.trimLeft = trimLeft;\r\nUrl.qs = qs;\r\n\r\nexport default Url;","// Copyright © 2017–2018 Domenic Denicola <d@domenic.me>\r\n// Permission is hereby granted, free of charge, to any person obtaining a copy of this software and associated documentation files (the \"Software\"), to deal in the Software without restriction, including without limitation the rights to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute, sublicense, and/or sell copies of the Software, and to permit persons to whom the Software is furnished to do so, subject to the following conditions:\r\n// The above copyright notice and this permission notice shall be included in all copies or substantial portions of the Software.\r\n// THE SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED \"AS IS\", WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO THE WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE AND NONINFRINGEMENT. IN NO EVENT SHALL THE AUTHORS OR COPYRIGHT HOLDERS BE LIABLE FOR ANY CLAIM, DAMAGES OR OTHER LIABILITY, WHETHER IN AN ACTION OF CONTRACT, TORT OR OTHERWISE, ARISING FROM, OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THE SOFTWARE OR THE USE OR OTHER DEALINGS IN THE SOFTWARE.\r\n\r\nexport const removeLeadingAndTrailingHTTPWhitespace = string => {\r\n\treturn string.replace(/^[ \\t\\n\\r]+/, \"\").replace(/[ \\t\\n\\r]+$/, \"\");\r\n};\r\n\r\nexport const removeTrailingHTTPWhitespace = string => {\r\n\treturn string.replace(/[ \\t\\n\\r]+$/, \"\");\r\n};\r\n\r\nexport const isHTTPWhitespaceChar = char => {\r\n\treturn char === \" \" || char === \"\\t\" || char === \"\\n\" || char === \"\\r\";\r\n};\r\n\r\nexport const solelyContainsHTTPTokenCodePoints = string => {\r\n\treturn /^[-!#$%&'*+.^_`|~A-Za-z0-9]*$/.test(string);\r\n};\r\n\r\nexport const soleyContainsHTTPQuotedStringTokenCodePoints = string => {\r\n\treturn /^[\\t\\u0020-\\u007E\\u0080-\\u00FF]*$/.test(string);\r\n};\r\n\r\nexport const asciiLowercase = string => {\r\n\treturn string.replace(/[A-Z]/g, l => l.toLowerCase());\r\n};\r\n\r\n// This variant only implements it with the extract-value flag set.\r\nexport const collectAnHTTPQuotedString = (input, position) => {\r\n\tlet value = \"\";\r\n\r\n\tposition++;\r\n\r\n\twhile (true) {\r\n\t\twhile (position < input.length && input[position] !== \"\\\"\" && input[position] !== \"\\\\\") {\r\n\t\t\tvalue += input[position];\r\n\t\t\t++position;\r\n\t\t}\r\n\r\n\t\tif (position >= input.length) {\r\n\t\t\tbreak;\r\n\t\t}\r\n\r\n\t\tconst quoteOrBackslash = input[position];\r\n\t\t++position;\r\n\r\n\t\tif (quoteOrBackslash === \"\\\\\") {\r\n\t\t\tif (position >= input.length) {\r\n\t\t\t\tvalue += \"\\\\\";\r\n\t\t\t\tbreak;\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\r\n\t\t\tvalue += input[position];\r\n\t\t\t++position;\r\n\t\t} else {\r\n\t\t\tbreak;\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\treturn [value, position];\r\n};\r\n","// Copyright © 2017–2018 Domenic Denicola <d@domenic.me>\r\n// Permission is hereby granted, free of charge, to any person obtaining a copy of this software and associated documentation files (the \"Software\"), to deal in the Software without restriction, including without limitation the rights to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute, sublicense, and/or sell copies of the Software, and to permit persons to whom the Software is furnished to do so, subject to the following conditions:\r\n// The above copyright notice and this permission notice shall be included in all copies or substantial portions of the Software.\r\n// THE SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED \"AS IS\", WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO THE WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE AND NONINFRINGEMENT. IN NO EVENT SHALL THE AUTHORS OR COPYRIGHT HOLDERS BE LIABLE FOR ANY CLAIM, DAMAGES OR OTHER LIABILITY, WHETHER IN AN ACTION OF CONTRACT, TORT OR OTHERWISE, ARISING FROM, OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THE SOFTWARE OR THE USE OR OTHER DEALINGS IN THE SOFTWARE.\r\n\r\nimport {\r\n\tremoveLeadingAndTrailingHTTPWhitespace,\r\n\tremoveTrailingHTTPWhitespace,\r\n\tisHTTPWhitespaceChar,\r\n\tsolelyContainsHTTPTokenCodePoints,\r\n\tsoleyContainsHTTPQuotedStringTokenCodePoints,\r\n\tasciiLowercase,\r\n\tcollectAnHTTPQuotedString\r\n} from \"./utils.js\";\r\n\r\nexport default input => {\r\n\tinput = removeLeadingAndTrailingHTTPWhitespace(input);\r\n\r\n\tlet position = 0;\r\n\tlet type = \"\";\r\n\twhile (position < input.length && input[position] !== \"/\") {\r\n\t\ttype += input[position];\r\n\t\t++position;\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tif (type.length === 0 || !solelyContainsHTTPTokenCodePoints(type)) {\r\n\t\treturn null;\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tif (position >= input.length) {\r\n\t\treturn null;\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\t// Skips past \"/\"\r\n\t++position;\r\n\r\n\tlet subtype = \"\";\r\n\twhile (position < input.length && input[position] !== \";\") {\r\n\t\tsubtype += input[position];\r\n\t\t++position;\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tsubtype = removeTrailingHTTPWhitespace(subtype);\r\n\r\n\tif (subtype.length === 0 || !solelyContainsHTTPTokenCodePoints(subtype)) {\r\n\t\treturn null;\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tconst mimeType = {\r\n\t\ttype: asciiLowercase(type),\r\n\t\tsubtype: asciiLowercase(subtype),\r\n\t\tparameters: new Map()\r\n\t};\r\n\r\n\twhile (position < input.length) {\r\n\t\t// Skip past \";\"\r\n\t\t++position;\r\n\r\n\t\twhile (isHTTPWhitespaceChar(input[position])) {\r\n\t\t\t++position;\r\n\t\t}\r\n\r\n\t\tlet parameterName = \"\";\r\n\t\twhile (position < input.length && input[position] !== \";\" && input[position] !== \"=\") {\r\n\t\t\tparameterName += input[position];\r\n\t\t\t++position;\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t\tparameterName = asciiLowercase(parameterName);\r\n\r\n\t\tif (position < input.length) {\r\n\t\t\tif (input[position] === \";\") {\r\n\t\t\t\tcontinue;\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\r\n\t\t\t// Skip past \"=\"\r\n\t\t\t++position;\r\n\t\t}\r\n\r\n\t\tlet parameterValue = null;\r\n\t\tif (input[position] === \"\\\"\") {\r\n\t\t\t[parameterValue, position] = collectAnHTTPQuotedString(input, position);\r\n\r\n\t\t\twhile (position < input.length && input[position] !== \";\") {\r\n\t\t\t\t++position;\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t} else {\r\n\t\t\tparameterValue = \"\";\r\n\t\t\twhile (position < input.length && input[position] !== \";\") {\r\n\t\t\t\tparameterValue += input[position];\r\n\t\t\t\t++position;\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\r\n\t\t\tparameterValue = removeTrailingHTTPWhitespace(parameterValue);\r\n\r\n\t\t\tif (parameterValue === \"\") {\r\n\t\t\t\tcontinue;\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t}\r\n\r\n\t\tif (parameterName.length > 0 &&\r\n\t\t\tsolelyContainsHTTPTokenCodePoints(parameterName) &&\r\n\t\t\tsoleyContainsHTTPQuotedStringTokenCodePoints(parameterValue) &&\r\n\t\t\t!mimeType.parameters.has(parameterName)) {\r\n\t\t\tmimeType.parameters.set(parameterName, parameterValue);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\treturn mimeType;\r\n};\r\n","import { ProgressEvent, EventTarget, Event, AddEventListenerOptions, EventListenerOptions } from \"../event\";\r\nimport { IURL } from \"./url\";\r\nexport type XMLHttpRequestResponseType = \"\" | \"arraybuffer\" | \"blob\" | \"document\" | \"json\" | \"text\";\r\nexport type XMLHttpRequestMethod = \"GET\" | \"POST\" | \"PUT\" | \"CREATE\" | \"DELETE\";\r\nexport type BodyInit = string | Record<string, any>;\r\nexport enum HttpStatusCode { Continue = 100, SwitchingProtocols = 101, OK = 200, Created = 201, Accepted = 202, NonAuthoritativeInformation = 203, NoContent = 204, ResetContent = 205, PartialContent = 206, MultipleChoices = 300, Ambiguous = 300, MovedPermanently = 301, Moved = 301, Found = 302, Redirect = 302, SeeOther = 303, RedirectMethod = 303, NotModified = 304, UseProxy = 305, Unused = 306, TemporaryRedirect = 307, RedirectKeepVerb = 307, BadRequest = 400, Unauthorized = 401, PaymentRequired = 402, Forbidden = 403, NotFound = 404, MethodNotAllowed = 405, NotAcceptable = 406, ProxyAuthenticationRequired = 407, RequestTimeout = 408, Conflict = 409, Gone = 410, LengthRequired = 411, PreconditionFailed = 412, RequestEntityTooLarge = 413, RequestUriTooLong = 414, UnsupportedMediaType = 415, RequestedRangeNotSatisfiable = 416, ExpectationFailed = 417, UpgradeRequired = 426, InternalServerError = 500, NotImplemented = 501, BadGateway = 502, ServiceUnavailable = 503, GatewayTimeout = 504, HttpVersionNotSupported = 505 }\r\n\r\nexport interface XMLHttpRequestEventTargetEventMap {\r\n\t\"abort\": ProgressEvent<XMLHttpRequestEventTarget>;\r\n\t\"error\": ProgressEvent<XMLHttpRequestEventTarget>;\r\n\t\"load\": ProgressEvent<XMLHttpRequestEventTarget>;\r\n\t\"loadend\": ProgressEvent<XMLHttpRequestEventTarget>;\r\n\t\"loadstart\": ProgressEvent<XMLHttpRequestEventTarget>;\r\n\t\"progress\": ProgressEvent<XMLHttpRequestEventTarget>;\r\n\t\"timeout\": ProgressEvent<XMLHttpRequestEventTarget>;\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport interface XMLHttpRequestEventMap extends XMLHttpRequestEventTargetEventMap {\r\n\t\"readystatechange\": Event;\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport class XMLHttpRequestEventTarget extends EventTarget {\r\n\r\n\tonabort: ((this: XMLHttpRequestBase, ev: ProgressEvent) => any) | null;\r\n\tonerror: ((this: XMLHttpRequestBase, ev: ProgressEvent) => any) | null;\r\n\tonload: ((this: XMLHttpRequestBase, ev: ProgressEvent) => any) | null;\r\n\tonloadend: ((this: XMLHttpRequestBase, ev: ProgressEvent) => any) | null;\r\n\tonloadstart: ((this: XMLHttpRequestBase, ev: ProgressEvent) => any) | null;\r\n\tonprogress: ((this: XMLHttpRequestBase, ev: ProgressEvent) => any) | null;\r\n\tontimeout: ((this: XMLHttpRequestBase, ev: ProgressEvent) => any) | null;\r\n\r\n\taddEventListener<K extends keyof XMLHttpRequestEventTargetEventMap>(type: K, listener: (this: XMLHttpRequestEventTarget, ev: XMLHttpRequestEventTargetEventMap[K]) => any, options?: boolean | AddEventListenerOptions): void {\r\n\t\tsuper.addEventListener(type, listener, options);\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tremoveEventListener<K extends keyof XMLHttpRequestEventTargetEventMap>(type: K, listener: (this: XMLHttpRequestEventTarget, ev: XMLHttpRequestEventTargetEventMap[K]) => any, options?: boolean | EventListenerOptions): void {\r\n\t\tsuper.addEventListener(type, listener, options);\r\n\t}\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport class XMLHttpRequestUpload extends XMLHttpRequestEventTarget {}\r\n\r\nexport enum XMLHttpRequestReadyState {\r\n\tUNSENT,\r\n\tOPENED,\r\n\tHEADERS_RECEIVED,\r\n\tLOADING,\r\n\tDONE,\r\n}\r\n\r\n/** Use XMLHttpRequest (XHR) objects to interact with servers. You can retrieve data from a URL without having to do a full page refresh. This enables a Web page to update just part of a page without disrupting what the user is doing. */\r\nexport class XMLHttpRequestBase extends XMLHttpRequestEventTarget {\r\n\r\n\tonreadystatechange: ((this: XMLHttpRequestBase, ev: Event) => any) | null;\r\n\r\n\tpublic get url() : Readonly<IURL> { return this._url; }\r\n\tprotected _url : IURL;\r\n\tprotected _method: XMLHttpRequestMethod;\r\n\tprotected _request_headers: {[key: string]: string} = {};\r\n\tprotected _connect_start_time: number;\r\n\r\n\t/**\r\n\t * Returns client's state.\r\n\t */\r\n\tget readyState(): XMLHttpRequestReadyState { return this._readyState; }\r\n\tset readyState(value: XMLHttpRequestReadyState) {\r\n\t\tif (value != this._readyState) {\r\n\t\t\tthis._readyState = value;\r\n\t\t\tif (this.onreadystatechange) {\r\n\t\t\t\tlet event = new Event('readystatechange');\r\n\t\t\t\tthis.onreadystatechange.call(this, event);\r\n\t\t\t\tthis.dispatchEvent(event);\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tprotected _readyState: XMLHttpRequestReadyState;\r\n\r\n\t/**\r\n\t * Returns the response's body.\r\n\t */\r\n\tget response(): any { return this._response; }\r\n\tprotected _response: any;\r\n\r\n\t/**\r\n\t * Returns the text response.\r\n\t *\r\n\t * Throws an \"InvalidStateError\" DOMException if responseType is not the empty string or \"text\".\r\n\t */\r\n\tget responseText(): string | null { return null; }\r\n\r\n\t/**\r\n\t * Returns the response type.\r\n\t *\r\n\t * Can be set to change the response type. Values are: the empty string (default), \"arraybuffer\", \"blob\", \"document\", \"json\", and \"text\".\r\n\t *\r\n\t * When set: setting to \"document\" is ignored if current global object is not a Window object.\r\n\t *\r\n\t * When set: throws an \"InvalidStateError\" DOMException if state is loading or done.\r\n\t *\r\n\t * When set: throws an \"InvalidAccessError\" DOMException if the synchronous flag is set and current global object is a Window object.\r\n\t */\r\n\tresponseType: XMLHttpRequestResponseType;\r\n\tget responseURL(): string { return null; }\r\n\r\n\t/**\r\n\t * Returns the document response.\r\n\t *\r\n\t * Throws an \"InvalidStateError\" DOMException if responseType is not the empty string or \"document\".\r\n\t */\r\n\tget responseXML(): string { return null} ;\r\n\tget status(): HttpStatusCode { return 0; };\r\n\treadonly statusText: string;\r\n\r\n\t/**\r\n\t * Can be set to a time in milliseconds. When set to a non-zero value will cause fetching to terminate after the given time has passed. When the time has passed, the request has not yet completed, and the synchronous flag is unset, a timeout event will then be dispatched, or a \"TimeoutError\" DOMException will be thrown otherwise (for the send() method).\r\n\t *\r\n\t * When set: throws an \"InvalidAccessError\" DOMException if the synchronous flag is set and current global object is a Window object.\r\n\t */\r\n\ttimeout: number;\r\n\r\n\t/**\r\n\t * Returns the associated XMLHttpRequestUpload object. It can be used to gather transmission information when data is transferred to a server.\r\n\t */\r\n\tget upload(): XMLHttpRequestUpload { return this._upload; }\r\n\tprotected _upload: XMLHttpRequestUpload;\r\n\r\n\t/**\r\n\t * True when credentials are to be included in a cross-origin request. False when they are to be excluded in a cross-origin request and when cookies are to be ignored in its response. Initially false.\r\n\t *\r\n\t * When set: throws an \"InvalidStateError\" DOMException if state is not unsent or opened, or if the send() flag is set.\r\n\t */\r\n\twithCredentials: boolean;\r\n\r\n\t/**\r\n\t * Cancels any network activity.\r\n\t */\r\n\tabort(): void {}\r\n\r\n\tgetAllResponseHeaders(): string { return \"\"; }\r\n\r\n\tgetResponseHeader(name: string): string | null { return null; }\r\n\r\n\t/**\r\n\t * Sets the request method, request URL, and synchronous flag.\r\n\t *\r\n\t * Throws a \"SyntaxError\" DOMException if either method is not a valid HTTP method or url cannot be parsed.\r\n\t *\r\n\t * Throws a \"SecurityError\" DOMException if method is a case-insensitive match for `CONNECT`, `TRACE`, or `TRACK`.\r\n\t *\r\n\t * Throws an \"InvalidAccessError\" DOMException if async is false, current global object is a Window object, and the timeout attribute is not zero or the responseType attribute is not the empty string.\r\n\t */\r\n\topen(method: XMLHttpRequestMethod, url: string, async?: boolean, username?: string | null, password?: string | null): void {}\r\n\r\n\t/**\r\n\t * Acts as if the `Content-Type` header value for response is mime. (It does not actually change the header though.)\r\n\t *\r\n\t * Throws an \"InvalidStateError\" DOMException if state is loading or done.\r\n\t */\r\n\toverrideMimeType(mime: string): void {\r\n\t\tthis._overrided_mime = mime;\r\n\t}\r\n\tprotected _overrided_mime: string;\r\n\r\n\t/**\r\n\t * Initiates the request. The body argument provides the request body, if any, and is ignored if the request method is GET or HEAD.\r\n\t *\r\n\t * Throws an \"InvalidStateError\" DOMException if either state is not opened or the send() flag is set.\r\n\t */\r\n\tsend(body?: BodyInit | null): void {}\r\n\r\n\t/**\r\n\t * Combines a header in author request headers.\r\n\t *\r\n\t * Throws an \"InvalidStateError\" DOMException if either state is not opened or the send() flag is set.\r\n\t *\r\n\t * Throws a \"SyntaxError\" DOMException if name is not a header name or if value is not a header value.\r\n\t */\r\n\tsetRequestHeader(name: string, value: string): void {\r\n\t\tthis._request_headers[name.toLowerCase()] = value;\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\taddEventListener<K extends keyof XMLHttpRequestEventMap>(type: K, listener: (this: XMLHttpRequestBase, ev: XMLHttpRequestEventMap[K]) => any, options?: boolean | AddEventListenerOptions): void {\r\n\t\tsuper.addEventListener(type as any, listener, options);\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tremoveEventListener<K extends keyof XMLHttpRequestEventMap>(type: K, listener: (this: XMLHttpRequestBase, ev: XMLHttpRequestEventMap[K]) => any, options?: boolean | EventListenerOptions): void {\r\n\t\tsuper.removeEventListener(type as any, listener, options);\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\r\n\tprivate _poll_task_id: number = -1;\r\n\tprotected $start_poll() {\r\n\t\tthis.$stop_poll();\r\n\t\tthis._poll_task_id = requestAnimationFrame(this.$tick.bind(this));\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tprotected $stop_poll() {\r\n\t\tif (this._poll_task_id != -1) {\r\n\t\t\tcancelAnimationFrame(this._poll_task_id);\r\n\t\t\tthis._poll_task_id = -1;\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tprotected $get_progress(): ProgressEventInit {\r\n\t\treturn {};\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tprotected $dispatch_event(type: keyof XMLHttpRequestEventTargetEventMap) {\r\n\t\tlet event: Event = undefined;\r\n\t\tif (type === 'progress') {\r\n\t\t\tlet evt = new ProgressEvent('progress', this.$get_progress());\r\n\t\t\tevent = evt;\r\n\t\t} else {\r\n\t\t\tevent = new Event(type);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t\tswitch (type) {\r\n\t\t\tcase 'load':\r\n\t\t\t\tif (this.onload) this.onload.call(this, event);\r\n\t\t\t\tbreak;\r\n\t\t\tcase 'loadend':\r\n\t\t\t\tif (this.onloadend) this.onloadend.call(this, event);\r\n\t\t\t\tbreak;\r\n\t\t\tcase 'loadstart':\r\n\t\t\t\tif (this.onloadstart) this.onloadstart.call(this, event);\r\n\t\t\t\tbreak;\r\n\t\t\tcase 'progress':\r\n\t\t\t\tif (this.onprogress) this.onprogress.call(this, event);\r\n\t\t\t\tbreak;\r\n\t\t\tcase 'timeout':\r\n\t\t\t\tif (this.ontimeout) this.ontimeout.call(this, event);\r\n\t\t\t\tbreak;\r\n\t\t\tcase 'abort':\r\n\t\t\t\tif (this.onabort) this.onabort.call(this, event);\r\n\t\t\t\tbreak;\r\n\t\t\tcase 'error':\r\n\t\t\t\tif (this.onerror) this.onerror.call(this, event);\r\n\t\t\t\tbreak;\r\n\t\t\tdefault:\r\n\t\t\t\tbreak;\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t\tthis.dispatchEvent(event);\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tprotected $tick() {}\r\n}","// Copyright © 2017–2018 Domenic Denicola <d@domenic.me>\r\n// Permission is hereby granted, free of charge, to any person obtaining a copy of this software and associated documentation files (the \"Software\"), to deal in the Software
